title: didymoglossum pusillum
intro: Didymoglossum pusillum is a species of fern commonly known as the small adder's tongue or miniature adder's tongue, belonging to the family Hymenophyllaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds that may help soothe digestive issues, wounds, and infections. The health benefits of Didymoglossum pusillum are thought to include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
